desc_fil: Empleyado sa pribadong kumpanya. Ibinabawas ang kontribusyon sa sweldo.
desc_en: Private sector employee. Contribution auto-deducted from salary.
eligibilityRule: 3 months contributions within last 6 months. Employer must be current on remittance.
contributionNote_fil: 5% ng basic salary, hatiin sa employer at empleyado. Minimum ₱500, maximum ₱5,000 bawat buwan.
contributionNote_en: 5% of basic salary, split between employer and employee. Minimum ₱500, max ₱5,000/month.
warningNote_fil: Kung hindi nag-remit ang employer ng iyong kontribusyon, maaaring matanggihan ang claim. I-check ang iyong MDR bago mag-admit.
warningNote_en: If your employer has not remitted your contributions, your claim may be denied. Check your MDR before admission.

warningNote_fil: I-verify ang iyong contribution status sa GSIS bago mag-admit.
warningNote_en: Verify your contribution status with GSIS before admission.

desc_fil: Freelancer, negosyante, o hindi employed. Ikaw mismo nagbabayad ng kontribusyon.
desc_en: Freelancer, business owner, or unemployed. You pay contributions yourself.
eligibilityRule: 3 months contributions within last 6 months. Most common reason for denial: lapsed payments.
warningNote_fil: Pinakamadalas na dahilan ng tinanggihang claim para sa voluntary members: nahulog na ang bayad. I-check ang iyong record bago mag-admit.
warningNote_en: Most common denial reason for voluntary members: lapsed contributions. Check your record before admission.

desc_fil: Nagtatrabaho sa ibang bansa. Ang mga dependents sa Pilipinas ay covered.
desc_en: Working abroad. Dependents in the Philippines are covered.
eligibilityRule: Fixed annual contribution. Dependents in PH can claim on member's behalf.
warningNote_fil: Ang OFW member mismo ay maaaring mag-claim kung nandito siya sa Pilipinas. Ang mga dependent ay maaaring mag-claim kahit nasa abroad ang member.
warningNote_en: The OFW member can claim if present in the Philippines. Dependents can claim even while member is abroad.

desc_fil: Sinusubsidiyahan ng gobyerno. Walang kailangang bayaran para sa kontribusyon.
eligibilityRule: No contribution required. Fully subsidized by national government.
warningNote_fil: Bilang indigent member, may karapatan kang sa No Balance Billing sa lahat ng government hospitals. Huwag hayaang singilin ka ng kahit ano.
warningNote_en: As an indigent member, you are entitled to No Balance Billing at all government hospitals. Do not allow any charges.
malasakitNote_fil: Pumunta agad sa Malasakit Center ng ospital pagka-admit. Layunin nito na maging zero ang iyong bayad sa pamamagitan ng PhilHealth + PCSO + DSWD + DOH.
malasakitNote_en: Go to the hospital's Malasakit Center immediately upon admission. It aims to make your bill zero through PhilHealth + PCSO + DSWD + DOH combined.

desc_fil: Binabayaran ng LGU o ibang entity ang iyong kontribusyon.
desc_en: Your contribution is paid by an LGU or another entity.
eligibilityRule: No contribution required from member. Sponsor (LGU or entity) must be current.
warningNote_fil: Bilang sponsored member, may karapatan kang sa No Balance Billing sa government hospitals.
warningNote_en: As a sponsored member, you are entitled to No Balance Billing at government hospitals.

desc_fil: Awtomatikong miyembro sa ilalim ng RA 10645. Hindi na kailangan ng kontribusyon.
desc_en: Automatically enrolled under RA 10645. No contribution required.
eligibilityRule: Automatic lifetime coverage. No contribution required.
discountNote_fil: DAGDAG NA BENEPISYO: 20% senior citizen discount sa professional fee, gamot, at lahat ng serbisyo (RA 9994) — BUKOD PA sa PhilHealth coverage. Dalawang benepisyo ang mag-aaplika.
discountNote_en: ADDITIONAL BENEFIT: 20% senior citizen discount on professional fees, medicines, and all services (RA 9994) — ON TOP of PhilHealth coverage. Both benefits apply.
warningNote_fil: Kung ang senior citizen ay nagtatrabaho pa rin, dapat patuloy na magbayad ng kontribusyon.
warningNote_en: If the senior citizen is still employed, they must continue paying contributions.

desc_fil: 120+ buwan ng kontribusyon na nabayaran. Hindi na kailangan ng dagdag na bayad.
desc_en: 120+ months of paid contributions. No further payments required.
eligibilityRule: 120 months total contributions paid (cumulative, any employer). Age 60+. No further contributions required.
warningNote_fil: Bilang lifetime member, may karapatan kang sa No Balance Billing sa government hospitals. Ipakita ang iyong lifetime member ID sa admitting.
warningNote_en: As a lifetime member, you are entitled to No Balance Billing at government hospitals. Show your lifetime member ID at admitting.

desc_fil: May 20% discount sa gamot at serbisyo (RA 10754), bukod pa sa PhilHealth.
desc_en: 20% discount on medicines and services (RA 10754), on top of PhilHealth.
eligibilityRule: Must be registered PWD. PhilHealth eligibility follows their membership type (employed, voluntary, etc.).
discountNote_fil: DAGDAG NA BENEPISYO: 20% PWD discount sa gamot at serbisyo (RA 10754) — BUKOD PA sa PhilHealth coverage.
discountNote_en: ADDITIONAL BENEFIT: 20% PWD discount on medicines and services (RA 10754) — ON TOP of PhilHealth coverage.

desc_fil: Yaya, cook, gardener, o ibang household worker. Binabayaran ng employer ang kontribusyon.
desc_en: Nanny, cook, gardener, or other household worker. Employer pays contribution.
eligibilityRule: Employer must register and pay contributions. Member entitled to No Balance Billing.
warningNote_fil: Bilang kasambahay, may karapatan kang sa No Balance Billing sa government hospitals. Responsibilidad ng employer ang iyong kontribusyon.
warningNote_en: As a kasambahay, you are entitled to No Balance Billing at government hospitals. Your employer is responsible for your contribution.
